summary: Results-driven Backend Software Engineer with hands-on experience in designing, developing, and deploying production-grade NestJS services across the healthcare, fintech, and e-commerce sectors. Demonstrated success in optimizing the performance, reliability, and security of scalable APIs serving thousands of concurrent users. Seeking to leverage technical expertise within a dynamic engineering team to take end-to-end ownership of backend architecture, mentor peers, and drive pragmatic system scaling.

tasks: Architected and developed a modular e-commerce backend (Modaza) using NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and TypeORM, encompassing authentication, catalog management, and payment processing.
Ensured robust security by implementing JWT, Google Auth, Helmet, strict rate-limiting (Throttler), CORS, and global validation strategies to mitigate web vulnerabilities.
Engineered high-performance background tasks and an optimized media-processing pipeline integrating Multer, Sharp, and Cloudinary, combined with specialized email dispatchers.
Designed and orchestrated a production-ready infrastructure using Docker Swarm, scaling NestJS across 4 replicas alongside a highly-available Nginx reverse proxy load balancer.
Documented comprehensive REST APIs via Swagger and established a centralized API schema extraction endpoint to streamline integration for web and mobile client applications.
Architected a scalable RESTful e-commerce API (Chocobar) using NestJS and TypeScript to serve complex business logic for highly customizable products.
Engineered a dynamic shopping cart system featuring automated real-time price calculations, dynamic delivery pricing, and advanced order aggregations.
Designed optimized NoSQL database schemas using MongoDB and Mongoose, leveraging complex aggregations to handle relational-like data efficiently.
Integrated the Paymob payment gateway for secure card processing, handling payment intents, checkouts, and verifying incoming webhooks.
Developed an automated PDF reporting service utilizing Puppeteer to dynamically generate invoices, receipts, and HTML-based customer lists.
Implemented secure role-based access control (RBAC) via JWT and Passport.js to strictly isolate Admin privileges from standard user access.
Contributed to the backend development of a secure e-payment gateway, heavily focused on high-speed transaction processing and robust error-handling mechanisms.
Refactored legacy Node.js modules to significantly enhance maintainability, fortified data validation and security protocols, and aligned the architecture with modern industry best practices.
